command-reroll.name: Command Re-roll
command-reroll.summary: Re-roll one dice roll, test, or saving throw.
command-reroll.when: Any phase, just after you make an Advance roll, a Charge roll, a Desperate Escape test or a Hazardous test for a unit from your army, or a Hit roll, a Wound roll, a Damage roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, or a roll to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon equipped by a model in that unit.
command-reroll.target: That unit or model from your army.
command-reroll.effect: You re-roll that roll, test or saving throw. If you are using fast dice rolling, select one of those rolls or saving throws to re-roll.

counter-offensive.name: Counter-offensive
counter-offensive.summary: Fight next, immediately after an enemy unit has fought.
counter-offensive.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has fought.
counter-offensive.target: One unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and that has not already been selected to fight this phase.

epic-challenge.name: Epic Challenge
epic-challenge.summary: One CHARACTER model gains [PRECISION] on all its melee attacks this phase.
epic-challenge.when: Fight phase, when a CHARACTER unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more Attached units is selected to fight.
epic-challenge.target: One CHARACTER model in your unit.
epic-challenge.effect: Until the end of the phase, all melee attacks made by that model have the [PRECISION] ability.

insane-bravery.name: Insane Bravery
insane-bravery.summary: One unit automatically passes its Battle-shock test. Once per battle.
insane-bravery.when: Battle-shock step of your Command phase, just before you take a Battle-shock test for a unit from your army.
insane-bravery.effect: Your unit automatically passes that Battle-shock test.
insane-bravery.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle.

grenade.name: Grenade
grenade.summary: Roll 6D6 with a GRENADES unit — each 4+ inflicts 1 mortal wound on a visible enemy within 8".
grenade.target: One GRENADES unit from your army (excluding units that Advanced, Fell Back or have shot this turn) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
grenade.effect: Select one GRENADES model in your unit and one enemy unit that is not within Engagement Range of any units from your army and is within 8" of and visible to your GRENADES model. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

tank-shock.name: Tank Shock
tank-shock.summary: After a VEHICLE charges, roll D6s equal to its Toughness — each 5+ deals 1 mortal wound (max 6).
tank-shock.when: Your Charge phase, just after a VEHICLE unit from your army ends a Charge move.
tank-shock.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, and select one VEHICLE model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. Roll a number of D6 equal to the Toughness characteristic of the selected VEHICLE model. For each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

rapid-ingress.name: Rapid Ingress
rapid-ingress.summary: Deploy one unit from Reserves at the end of your opponent's Movement phase.
rapid-ingress.when: End of your opponent's Movement phase.
rapid-ingress.target: One unit from your army that is in Reserves.
rapid-ingress.effect: Your unit can arrive on the battlefield as if it were the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, and if every model in that unit has the Deep Strike ability, you can set that unit up as described in the Deep Strike ability (even though it is not your Movement phase).
rapid-ingress.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem to enable a unit to arrive on the battlefield during a battle round it would not normally be able to do so in.

fire-overwatch.name: Fire Overwatch
fire-overwatch.summary: Shoot at an enemy unit that moves or charges. Hits only on unmodified 6s. Once per turn.
fire-overwatch.when: Your opponent's Movement or Charge phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or when an enemy unit starts or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, or declares a charge.
fire-overwatch.target: One unit from your army that is within 24" of that enemy unit and that would be eligible to shoot if it were your Shooting phase.
fire-overwatch.effect: If that enemy unit is visible to your unit, your unit can shoot that enemy unit as if it were your Shooting phase.
fire-overwatch.restrictions: You cannot target a TITANIC unit with this Stratagem. Each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit. You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

go-to-ground.name: Go to Ground
go-to-ground.summary: Targeted INFANTRY gains a 6+ invulnerable save and Benefit of Cover until end of phase.
go-to-ground.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
go-to-ground.target: One INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
go-to-ground.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have a 6+ invulnerable save and have the Benefit of Cover.

smokescreen.name: Smokescreen
smokescreen.summary: Targeted SMOKE unit gains Benefit of Cover and Stealth until end of phase.
smokescreen.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
smokescreen.target: One SMOKE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
smokescreen.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have the Benefit of Cover and the Stealth ability.

heroic-intervention.name: Heroic Intervention
heroic-intervention.summary: Declare a charge against an enemy that just charged you. No Charge bonus applies.
heroic-intervention.when: Your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
heroic-intervention.target: One unit from your army that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase.
heroic-intervention.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only that enemy unit, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase.
heroic-intervention.restrictions: You can only select a VEHICLE unit from your army if it is a WALKER. Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

fury-of-the-hearth.name: Fury of the Hearth
fury-of-the-hearth.summary: Einhyr Hearthguard ranged weapons get +1S. Spend 1YP to also gain Sustained Hits 1.
fury-of-the-hearth.target: One Einhyr Hearthguard unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
fury-of-the-hearth.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1. If you spend 1YP, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability as well.

secure-positions.name: Secure Positions
secure-positions.summary: Disembark one unit from a TRANSPORT at the end of any of your phases. Cannot charge this turn.
secure-positions.when: End of any of your phases.
secure-positions.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN TRANSPORT unit from your army.
secure-positions.effect: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit embarked within your TRANSPORT can disembark. When doing so, models in that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of your TRANSPORT. That unit cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

bastion-running.name: Bastion Running
bastion-running.summary: HEKATON LAND FORTRESS can move through terrain features this phase.
bastion-running.target: One Hekaton Land Fortress unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
bastion-running.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

illuminated-priority.name: Illuminated Priority
illuminated-priority.summary: After a friendly VEHICLE shoots, LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY re-roll Hit rolls of 1 against that target.
illuminated-priority.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE unit from your army has shot.
illuminated-priority.target: That LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE unit.
illuminated-priority.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

inexorable-efficiency.name: Inexorable Efficiency
inexorable-efficiency.summary: Unit can shoot this phase even though it Fell Back.
inexorable-efficiency.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army.
inexorable-efficiency.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

opportunistic-escalation.name: Opportunistic Escalation
opportunistic-escalation.summary: A VEHICLE (not HEKATON) hit by enemy shooting makes a free Normal move of up to D6".
opportunistic-escalation.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, if units from your army have Hostile Acquisition.
opportunistic-escalation.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE unit from your army (excluding HEKATON LAND FORTRESS units) that was hit by one or more of those attacks.
opportunistic-escalation.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

vengeance-flare.name: Vengeance Flare
vengeance-flare.summary: After being hit, a nearby KAPRICUS/SAGITAUR shoots back. Spend 2YP to use a HEKATON instead.
vengeance-flare.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
vengeance-flare.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit from your army that was hit by one or more of those attacks.
vengeance-flare.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Select one friendly Kapricus or Sagitaur unit within 6" of your INFANTRY unit. If you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, you can select one friendly Hekaton Land Fortress unit within 6" of your INFANTRY unit instead. The selected unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase. When doing so, models in the selected unit can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

superior-craftsmanship.name: Superior Craftsmanship
superior-craftsmanship.summary: +1 Damage on all attacks targeting a MONSTER or VEHICLE this Fight phase.
superior-craftsmanship.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
superior-craftsmanship.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

brekkeknots.name: Brëkkeknots
brekkeknots.summary: Kâhl, Ûthar or Einhyr Hearthguard unit gains a 4+ invulnerable save until end of phase.
brekkeknots.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
brekkeknots.target: One Kâhl, Ûthar the Destined or Einhyr Hearthguard unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
brekkeknots.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

materialisation-matrices.name: Materialisation Matrices
materialisation-matrices.summary: Deep Strike unit deploys anywhere >6" from enemies. Cannot charge this turn.
materialisation-matrices.when: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
materialisation-matrices.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that is in Reserves and has the Deep Strike ability.
materialisation-matrices.effect: Until the end of the phase, when your unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
materialisation-matrices.restrictions: Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

unyielding-aggression.name: Unyielding Aggression
unyielding-aggression.summary: INFANTRY unit that Fell Back can still shoot and declare a charge this turn.
unyielding-aggression.when: Your Movement phase, just after a LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit from your army Falls Back.
unyielding-aggression.target: That LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit.
unyielding-aggression.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

sure-of-purpose.name: Sure of Purpose
sure-of-purpose.summary: Pile-in and Consolidation moves are increased to 6" this Fight phase.
sure-of-purpose.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
sure-of-purpose.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

cyberstimm-infusion.name: Cyberstimm Infusion
cyberstimm-infusion.type: Dêlve Assault Shift – Battle Tactic Stratagem
cyberstimm-infusion.summary: Re-roll Wound rolls of 1. Spend 2YP to re-roll all Wound rolls instead.
cyberstimm-infusion.target: One Cthonian Beserks unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
cyberstimm-infusion.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

hidden-accessways.name: Hidden Accessways
hidden-accessways.type: Dêlve Assault Shift – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
hidden-accessways.summary: Remove a BESERKS, HEARTHKYN or YAEGIRS unit from the battlefield into Strategic Reserves.
hidden-accessways.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
hidden-accessways.target: One Cthonian Beserks, Hearthkyn Warriors or Hernkyn Yaegirs unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
hidden-accessways.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

weaveworke-buttress.name: Weavewërke Buttress
weaveworke-buttress.type: Dêlve Assault Shift – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
weaveworke-buttress.summary: Targeted INFANTRY subtracts 1 from Wound rolls against it until end of phase.
weaveworke-buttress.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, if units from your army have Hostile Acquisition.
weaveworke-buttress.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
weaveworke-buttress.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

tectonic-fracture.name: Tectonic Fracture
tectonic-fracture.type: Dêlve Assault Shift – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
tectonic-fracture.summary: Enemy unit loses -2" Move. Spend 2YP to also subtract 2 from their Charge rolls.
tectonic-fracture.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a CTHONIAN EARTHSHAKERS unit from your army has shot.
tectonic-fracture.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of your unit's attacks this phase. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, subtract 2 from that unit's Move characteristic and, if you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

augmented-assault.name: Augmented Assault
augmented-assault.type: Dêlve Assault Shift – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
augmented-assault.summary: BESERKS gain +1-2" Move (spend up to 2YP) and can charge even after Advancing.
augmented-assault.target: One Cthonian Beserks unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
augmented-assault.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend up to 2YP. Until the end of the turn, add X" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, where X is the number of YP you spent during this use of this Stratagem, and your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

unstoppable-force.name: Unstoppable Force
unstoppable-force.type: Dêlve Assault Shift – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
unstoppable-force.summary: Pile-in and Consolidation moves increased to 6" this Fight phase.
unstoppable-force.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
unstoppable-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Piles In or Consolidates, each model in that unit can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

wall-of-steel.name: Wall of Steel
wall-of-steel.summary: After IRONKIN STEELJACKS charge, roll D6s vs a non-MONSTER/VEHICLE — each 4+ deals 1MW. Spend 2YP for +2 dice.
wall-of-steel.when: Your Charge phase, just after an Ironkin Steeljacks unit from your army ends a Charge move.
wall-of-steel.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 2YP. Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each model in your unit, rolling two additional D6 if you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

unwavering-accuracy.name: Unwavering Accuracy
unwavering-accuracy.summary: BRÔKHYR THUNDERKYN ignores all modifiers to BS, Hit rolls, Wound rolls, and AP this phase.
unwavering-accuracy.target: One Brôkhyr Thunderkyn unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
unwavering-accuracy.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack's Ballistic Skill characteristic; the Hit roll; the Wound roll; that attack's Armour Penetration characteristic.

preventative-purge.name: Preventative Purge
preventative-purge.summary: THUNDERKYN or STEELJACKS shoots at an enemy that just Fell Back, but at -1 to Hit.
preventative-purge.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
preventative-purge.target: One Brôkhyr Thunderkyn or Ironkin Steeljacks unit from your army.
preventative-purge.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase. When doing so, models in your unit can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

cogitated-need.name: Cogitated Need
cogitated-need.summary: IRONKIN STEELJACKS makes a free Normal move toward the closest objective marker.
cogitated-need.when: End of your opponent's Movement phase.
cogitated-need.target: One Ironkin Steeljacks unit from your army.
cogitated-need.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move. When doing so, your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker.

first-concern.name: First Concern
first-concern.summary: If unit Remained Stationary this turn, it can make a free Normal move after shooting.
first-concern.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a Brôkhyr, Ironkin Steeljacks or Arkanyst Evaluator unit from your army has shot.
first-concern.target: That BRÔKHYR, IRONKIN STEELJACKS or ARKANYST EVALUATOR unit.
first-concern.effect: If your unit Remained Stationary in your Movement phase this turn, it can make a Normal move.

delayed-fire-rounds.name: Delayed-Fire Rounds
delayed-fire-rounds.summary: Enemy unit hit this phase suffers 1MW per model that moves (on a 1) until your next Shooting phase.
delayed-fire-rounds.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a Brôkhyr, Ironkin Steeljacks or Arkanyst Evaluator unit from your army has shot.
delayed-fire-rounds.target: That BRÔKHYR, IRONKIN STEELJACKS or ARKANYST EVALUATOR unit.
delayed-fire-rounds.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time that enemy unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 1, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

huntrs-mark.name: Huntr's Mark
huntrs-mark.summary: Re-roll 1s to Hit and Wound for a unit this Shooting phase.
huntrs-mark.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
huntrs-mark.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

ancestral-sentence.name: Ancestral Sentence
ancestral-sentence.summary: Ranged weapons gain [SUSTAINED HITS 1] (or 2 for 3YP) this phase.
ancestral-sentence.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
ancestral-sentence.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 3YP. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, until the end of the phase, those weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead.

honour-of-the-hold.name: Honour of the Hold
honour-of-the-hold.summary: Melee attacks vs one enemy gain AP-1 (or AP-2 for 3YP) this phase.
honour-of-the-hold.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
honour-of-the-hold.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can spend 3YP. Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If you spent YP during this use of this Stratagem, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 2 instead.

reactive-reprisal.name: Reactive Reprisal
reactive-reprisal.summary: After being shot at (with Fortify Takeover active), shoot back at the attacker.
reactive-reprisal.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot, if units from your army have Fortify Takeover.
reactive-reprisal.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
reactive-reprisal.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, can only target that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

ordered-retreat.name: Ordered Retreat
ordered-retreat.summary: A unit that Fell Back can still shoot and charge this turn.
ordered-retreat.when: Your Movement phase, just after a LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army Falls Back.
ordered-retreat.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

void-hardened.name: Void Hardened
void-hardened.summary: Worsen the AP of all attacks targeting your unit by 1 (Fortify Takeover active).
void-hardened.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets, if units from your army have Fortify Takeover.
void-hardened.target: One LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
void-hardened.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
